message:
fix: remove WithAutoCommit from hookBeadWithRetry

runSling sets BD_DOLT_AUTO_COMMIT=off to prevent manifest contention
under concurrent load, but hookBeadWithRetry was overriding it back
to on via WithAutoCommit(). Fixes TestSlingSetsDoltAutoCommitOff.

Cherry-picked from PR #2517.

Co-authored-by: Chris Deal <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
